hooks.command: bash -lc 'd="$(pwd)"; while [ "$d" != "/" ]; do if [ -z "${ROOT:-}" ] && [ -f "$d/scripts/hooks/apifox_sync_guard.py" ]; then ROOT="$d"; fi; if [ -z "${PY:-}" ]; then for v in .venv venv env; do if [ -x "$d/$v/bin/python" ]; then PY="$d/$v/bin/python"; break; fi; done; fi; if [ -n "${ROOT:-}" ] && [ -n "${PY:-}" ]; then break; fi; d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; if [ -z "${PY:-}" ]; then echo "未找到项目本地虚拟环境，请先创建 .venv、venv 或 env" >&2; exit 1; fi; if [ -z "${ROOT:-}" ]; then echo "未找到 Apifox 同步守卫脚本，请确认 scripts/hooks/apifox_sync_guard.py 存在" >&2; exit 1; fi; cd "$ROOT" && "$PY" scripts/hooks/apifox_sync_guard.py'
